texto: I dated a guy for over a year who lied about his age the entire time. I found out after the fact and couldn't believe it! I even threw him a birthday party for the wrong age... I couldn't get over how hard he had tried to keep it a secret!
explicacao: Citação de Kirsten Prout sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I dated a guy for over a year who lied about his age the entire time. I found out after the fact …” articula tempo, time, age em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e age.

texto: I like sundresses with cowboy boots, little shorts with big wedge heels and a big piece of turquoise. I also love classic, Old Hollywood romantic styles. I'm 'country girl meets city girl' circa 1930.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kirsten Prout: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I like sundresses with cowboy boots, little shorts with big wedge heels and a big piece of turquo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, girl pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de girl e city.
